{{CargoClone
|name=Blink Stewart
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=139
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=When in Mutant Form:
> Gain +1.5% Time Chests in explorations
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=When in Mutant Form:
> Gain +2.5% Time Chests in explorations
|}}
